name: amacrf
description: Adaptive Multi-Agent Chaotic Regime Framework — self-evolving quantitative trading system with HACP cognition protocol

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,ui -c blue,green "tsx watch src/index.ts" "cd ui && npm run dev"
scripts.start: cd ui && npm run build && cd .. && tsx src/index.ts
scripts.engineer: cd ui && npm run build && cd .. && bash scripts/engineer-loop.sh
